name: TORSION OF FALLOPIAN TUBE

demographics.Age: adolescent girls + women of reproductive age
demographics.Location: R >> L ← fixation by sigmoid colon

dominant_finding: dilated fluid-filled structure separate from ovary:
distribution: R >> L ← fixation by sigmoid colon
discriminating_features: dilated fluid-filled structure separate from ovary:
tubular shape with tapered ends (= "beak" sign)
twisted configuration of dilated tubular cystic mass

US: fusiform tubal dilatation with tapered ends
central solid component (= edematous mesosalpinx) surrounded by dilated tube
CT: dilated fluid-filled structure separate from ovary:
tubular shape with tapered ends (= "beak" sign)
twisted configuration of dilated tubular cystic mass
